name: Sherried Chestnut Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Long-grain rice & wild rice (6 oz size packages)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh chestnuts, slit the shells on one side and cook in boiling water for 20 minutes to cover.
2. Cool, peel off the shells and skin, and dice coarsely.
3. Drain and dice canned chestnuts if used.
4. Cook rice in water according to package directions, using seasonings from the package and adding sherry and 1 tablespoon butter.
5. Meanwhile, melt remaining 3 tablespoons butter in a skillet.
6. Add onion, celery, and parsley and cook until the onion is tender but not browned.
7. Combine rice with vegetables and chestnuts. Makes enough for a 10-pound turkey.
